title: Short title
doc_html:
PART II.  LICENSING OF HOSPITALS

SUBPART A.  THE HOSPITAL LICENSING LAW

§2100.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the Hospital Licensing Law.

Added by Acts 1961, No. 90, §1.  Acts 1997, No. 1371, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1998.
